executive_summary: - Added PocketBase handler to enable integration with PocketBase collections via MindsDB.
- Implemented authentication using PocketBase credentials and added connection arguments.
- Provided detailed file changes and updated documentation for new features.
- Enhanced file paths and confirmed all significant changes were captured.

change_units.title: PocketBase Handler Integration
change_units.description: Adds a new handler to connect MindsDB with PocketBase collections.
change_units.inferred_intent: Non-breaking change to add new functionality
change_units.evidence: Commit #1675 - additional test for mysql api

risks_and_concerns: - Potential issues with PocketBase authentication and token management.
- Ensuring proper handling of connection parameters and credentials.
- Verifying that MindsDB stores data in expected directories.
